• Main Page
  • Modules
  • Data Structures
  • Files
  • Examples

Modules

Here is a list of all modules:
  • Tilera Multicore Components (TMC™) Library
    • Specified-Attribute Memory Page Allocation (tmc/alloc.h)
    • "Common Memory" APIs for tmc_shmem (tmc/cmem.h)
    • CPU Sets and Affinitization (tmc/cpus.h)
    • User-space Interrupt Installation Routines (tmc/interrupt.h)
    • Interprocessor Interrupt Event-handling Routines (tmc/ipi.h)
    • Using mspaces for standard malloc/free (tmc/malloc.h)
    • Cache Control (tmc/mem.h)
    • Multiple Heap Allocation (tmc/mspace.h)
    • Performance Tuning (tmc/perf.h)
    • Shared Memory FIFOs (tmc/queue.h)
    • Multi-Process Shared Memory Arenas (tmc/shmem.h)
    • Spinning Shared Memory Synchronization (tmc/spin.h)
    • Scheduler Shared Memory Synchronization (tmc/sync.h)
    • Task Management and Cleanup (tmc/task.h)
    • UDN Helper Routines (tmc/udn.h)
  • Tile Architecture Headers
    • Atomic Instruction Macros (arch/atomic.h)
    • Low-Level UDN Support (arch/udn.h)
    • Cycle Counters (arch/cycle.h)
    • Simulator Control (arch/sim.h)
  • gxio Low-Level IO Device Control API
    • mPIPE Device API (gxio/mpipe.h)
    • mPIPE Ingress and Egress Wrappers
    • mPIPE Classifier Programs
    • mPIPE Link Management
      • Link Open Flags
      • Link Attributes
      • Link Long Attributes
      • Statistics configuration
      • Link State Flags
      • Module Types
    • mPIPE Timestamp
    • TRIO Device API (gxio/trio.h)
    • MiCA Device API (gxio/mica.h)
    • MiCA Queue API (gxio/mica_queue.h)
    • MiCA PKA Device API (gxio/pka.h)
    • MiCA PKA TRNG Device API (gxio/pka.h)
    • GPIO Device API (gxio/gpio.h)
    • USB Device API (gxio/usb_dev.h)
    • gxio Error Codes
  • gxcr User-Level Crypto Acceleration API
    • Crypto API (gxcr/gxcr.h)
      • Bulk Cipher and Digest (gxcr/tokens/bulk_crypto_digest.h)
      • HMAC Digest precalculation (gxcr/tokens/hmac_precalc.h)
      • Bulk Cipher and Digest Successive (gxcr/tokens/bulk_successive.h)
    • IPsec API (gxcr/ipsec.h)
      • IPsec ESP Inbound (gxcr/tokens/esp_ip4v_tunnel_ibound.h)
      • IPsec ESP Outbound (gxcr/tokens/esp_ip4v_tunnel_obound.h)
    • Authentication and Encryption with Additional Data (AEAD) API (gxcr/aead.h)
      • Authentication and Encryption with Additional Data (AEAD) (gxcr/tokens/aead.h)
    • Public Key Cryptography API (gxcr/pka.h)
    • gxcr Error Codes
  • gxpci PCIe and StreamIO Data Transfer API
  • Miscellaneous Components
    • MDE Version Checking (mde-version.h)

The following are trademarks of Tilera Corporation: Embedding Multicore, The Multicore Company, Tile Processor, TILE Architecture, TILE64, TILEPro, TILEPro36, TILEPro64, TILExpress, TILExpress-64, TILExpressPro-64, TILExpress-20G, TILExpressPro-20G, TILExpressPro-22G, iMesh, TileDirect, TILEmpower, TILEmpower-Gx, TILEncore, TILEncorePro, TILEncore-Gx, TILE-Gx, TILE-Gx16, TILE-Gx36, TILE-Gx64, TILE-Gx100, TILE-Gx3000, TILE-Gx5000, TILE-Gx8000, DDC (Dynamic Distributed Cache), Multicore Development Environment, Gentle Slope Programming, iLib, TMC (Tilera Multicore Components), hardwall, Zero Overhead Linux (ZOL), MiCA (Multicore iMesh Coprocessing Accelerator), and mPIPE (multicore Programmable Intelligent Packet Engine). All other trademarks and/or registered trademarks are the property of their respective owners.

Third-party software: The Tilera IDE makes use of the BeanShell scripting library. Source code for the BeanShell library can be found at the BeanShell website (http://www.beanshell.org/developer.html).

The following is a trademark of Marvell Semiconductor, Inc.: Distributed Switching Architecture (DSA).
